firebase.description: Firebase MCP server for Firestore, Auth, Cloud Functions, and Security Rules operations

github.description: GitHub MCP server for repository operations — branches, commits, PRs, issues

context7.description: Context7 MCP server for up-to-date library/API documentation lookups (React Native, Expo, Firebase SDK)

wiki_manager.description: Keeps wiki/ docs updated. Uses context7 for current library API references during documentation.

git_manager.description: Manages git commits, branches, PRs via GitHub plugin.

test_manager.description: Manages Jest testing and coverage reporting.

code_review.description: Reviews code using context7 to verify API correctness and best practices.

documentation.description: Generates documentation with context7-verified API references.
